properties.query: SELECT b.board_id, b.title, b.created_at, u.nickname FROM board b JOIN Users u ON b.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE b.category_id = ? ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT b.board_id, b.title, b.created_at, u.nickname FROM board b JOIN Users u ON b.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE b.creator_id = ? ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
INSERT INTO board (village_id, creator_id, category_id, title, content) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE board SET title = ?, content = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = ? AND creator_id = ?
DELETE FROM board WHERE board_id = ? AND creator_id = ?
SELECT b.board_id, b.title, b.content, b.created_at, u.nickname FROM board b JOIN Users u ON b.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE b.board_id = ?
